patientAccountId.title: Patient Account ID
patientAccountId.description: Person Account Id. Omit if Patient lookup email is provided.

patientLookupEmail.title: Patient lookup email
patientLookupEmail.description: Single Person Account email only (e.g. meera.iyer@example.com). Do not pass JSON, maps, or notification payloads—plain email text.

patientContactId.title: Patient Contact ID
patientContactId.description: Optional Contact Id linked to the patient.

workTypeId.title: Work Type ID
workTypeId.description: WorkType Id; omit to default to Onco New Consult.

startTimeUtc.title: Start Time UTC
startTimeUtc.description: Exact ISO 8601 UTC start time as shown on the slot line (e.g. 2026-04-20T03:54:11Z). Copy from Get Available Appointment Slots output.
